title: malus trilobata
intro: Malus trilobata, also known as the desert crabapple, is a shrub-like plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Malus trilobata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
